name: Grilled Seafood Flautas
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Green Onions with tops; Sliced
recipeInstructions:
See Section 2 for recipe.  Use 1 package of Frozen salad-style imitation crab meat, thawed  Artichoke hearts should be drained and cut into quarters. Use one  Flour tortillas should be 7 to 8 inches in diameter and be warm.
- Prepare Roasted Tomato Sauce; set aside.
- Cook crabmeat and onions in 1 tablespoon of butter or margarine over medium heat, stirring frequently, until onions are tender.
- Mix in sour cream, cheese, and artichoke hearts. Spoon about 1/2 cup of the mixture onto one end of each tortilla.
- Roll up tightly into a cylindrical shape; secure with wooden picks.
- Heat 1 tablespoon of butter or margarine in an 10-inch skillet over medium heat until hot and bubbly.
- Cook 3 or 4 flautas in the butter or margarine, turning frequently, until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Keep warm in a 300 degree F. oven.
- Repeat with remaining flautas, adding the remaining butter or margarine as needed.
- Serve with warm Roasted Tomato Sauce.
